text:
There was once a knight. That knight went about a wicked war.

They weren't wicked? You think they murdered people?

You think...

Oh heavens. That's worse! I've done that once. I'll bring...

What? Roses?

Oh. No. No. That's...

They hated you. They thought your nose... You know nothing good!

Oh gods...

But you knew you liked them...

Oh heavens...I think...maybe...

You think... maybe...

With every leaf that turned?

With every petal?


They...They loved...You?


You weren't killed?

You think...

You think...I'm...I think...

They didn't think...

Oh heavens...

They think...

There you lie...

There weren’t many people...

A few wives...

Oh heavens...

What an odd story.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
